name: Home Depot Consumer Credit Card

welcome_offer.description: No standard welcome offer; promotional financing on purchases

earning_rates.notes: No cash back; primarily a financing tool for Home Depot purchases

other_benefits.name: Promotional Financing
other_benefits.description: 0% APR for 6-18 months on Home Depot purchases (subject to credit approval)

notes: Consumer version of Home Depot card issued by Citi. Primarily for project financing rather than rewards. Not typically covered in standard credit card reward comparisons.
